name: Team Fortress 2
author: ops@refx.example
description: Valve's class-based shooter. SteamCMD-installed srcds dedicated server with map and player configuration.
startupDetect: Network: IP|Connection to Steam servers successful

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 232250 validate +quit
# Steam API runtime: srcds/Steamworks servers dlopen steamclient.so from
# ~/.steam/sdk32 + ~/.steam/sdk64 (HOME=/home/container, i.e. this dir, at
# runtime) and hard-fail/segfault without it. Copy it from the bootstrapped
# steamcmd (locate by arch wherever steamcmd cached it).
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32 /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
sc_find() { find /mnt/server/steamcmd "${HOME:-/root}" /root -type f -name steamclient.so \( -path "*linux$1*" -o -path "*sdk$1*" \) -print 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || true; }
SC32="$(sc_find 32)"; [ -n "$SC32" ] && cp -f "$SC32" /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so || true
SC64="$(sc_find 64)"; [ -n "$SC64" ] && cp -f "$SC64" /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so || true
[ -f /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so ] || echo "[refx] WARN: 64-bit steamclient.so not found; if the server fails to start, reinstall."
echo 'Team Fortress 2 install complete.'

variables.description: Map the server loads on start.
Steam GSLT for app 232250 (required for public listing).

longDescription: Host classic TF2 modes — CTF, Payload, KOTH and more — with SourceTV and full server.cfg control.
